description: Fleet-level ArgoCD application sync status counts, health distribution, and sync operation rates via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Fleet-level sync metrics from argocd_app_info (application inventory with sync_status and health_status labels) and argocd_app_sync_total (sync operation counter with phase label). Counts are instant aggregates; rates use 5m windows.
name: ArgoCD_Sync_Overview
